original_abstract: *International Higher Education* (IHE) provides evidence-based commentary and expert analysis on the critical trends shaping the global academic landscape. By examining the evolving challenges facing systems, institutions, and stakeholders worldwide, the publication serves as a vital resource for understanding the complexities of contemporary higher education.
humanized_abstract: The *International Higher Education* (IHE) newsletter provides thoughtful analysis and data-based overview of some of the significant issues facing higher education systems, institutions and stakeholders around the globe. It is meant to shed light on developments and issues of current concern in international higher education.

document.output: The *International Higher Education* (IHE) newsletter provides thoughtful analysis and data-based overview of some of the significant issues facing higher education systems, institutions and stakeholders around the globe. It is meant to shed light on developments and issues of current concern in international higher education.
